title: Bolbidium barbosae
taxonomy: Bolbidium barbosae is classified as a species of beetle in the family Cerambycidae. This family is commonly known as longhorned beetles due to their distinctive elongated antennae. The Cerambycidae family is further divided into various subfamilies, each with unique characteristics. As a member of the Cerambycidae family, Bolbidium barbosae is closely related to other longhorned beetles. Its classification within the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, and class Insecta highlights its place in the larger taxonomic hierarchy.
